summary: UI + logic alignment pass testing completed successfully. All 10 features verified: Staff page shows 'Staff' header with 'Recruited' badge and clarifying text, Staff rows show 'Staff' badge next to name, Recruitment Pipeline shows 'Applicants' badge with clarifying text and 'Approve Recruitment' button (renamed), Employee Profile shows 'Staff' badge and 3-tier work readiness with reasons, tabs renamed to 'Compliance File' and 'All Files', Compliance File tab shows 'Required/Awaiting Review/Verified' status labels, All Files tab shows 'Library View' badge with read-only description.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing employees: Olakunle (d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77), Lawrence (ccfcbdbb-feda-4043-a8b2-2f1f9da88bdf)
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI alignment pass completed. Key verified changes: (1) Staff page header shows 'Staff' with 'Recruited' badge and clarifying text about applicant vs staff split, (2) Staff rows show 'Staff' badge next to employee names, (3) Recruitment Pipeline shows 'Applicants' badge with clarifying text and 'Approve Recruitment' button (renamed from 'Approve'), (4) Employee Profile shows 'Staff' or 'Applicant' badge with 3-tier work readiness status and reasons, (5) Tabs renamed: 'What's Needed' → 'Compliance File', 'Documents' → 'All Files', (6) Compliance File tab shows 'Required/Awaiting Review/Verified' status labels, (7) All Files tab shows 'Library View' badge with read-only description.
